assertions.rationale: Only sets options.MutualTls.Enabled = true. AlwaysEmitConfirmationClaim is never configured, which is the critical setting for token binding without certificate auth.

assertions.assertion: Client uses standard shared secret authentication (not certificate-based authentication)
assertions.rationale: Line 20 uses new Secret("secret".Sha256()) — standard shared secret.

assertions.assertion: Explains that the cnf claim with x5t#S256 will be embedded in the access token
assertions.rationale: Mentions 'cnf claim with the certificate's thumbprint' generically but does not specifically reference x5t#S256.

assertions.assertion: Mentions that the client must use a TLS client certificate when calling the token endpoint (even though the certificate is not used for authentication)
assertions.rationale: Mentions 'presents a certificate during the TLS handshake' generically but does not clarify this is required even when the certificate is not used for authentication.
